title: TikTok's AI remixing feature—what creators need to know - Ad Age
text:
Influencers & Creators
TikTok is letting users remix videos with AI—what creators need to know
Gift Article
Share
Expand
TikTok began quietly piloting its "Meme Remixer" feature earlier this month, allowing select U.S. users to edit frames from creators' videos using AI.
(@kalypehngs, @jonahmanzano, @lana.k.social)
